name: Apple Chocolate Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chocolate, half a cup of milk, and half a cup of sugar in a saucepan.
2. Cook and stir until thick and smooth. Stir in the applesauce and vanilla. Allow to cool.
3. Combine and sift the dry ingredients. Set aside.
4. Cream the shortening with the remaining cup of sugar, then blend in the eggs one at a time.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and the remaining three-quarters of a cup of milk to the creamed mixture, blending well after each addition.
6. Blend in the chocolate mixture. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 8-inch layer pans.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for 40 minutes, or until tested done. Allow to cool.
8. Split each cooled layer. Frost the cake with APPLE FLUFF FROSTING or APPLE CREAM FROSTING (see separate recipes).
